title: Generate V1 voice profiles config with profile getter and recommender functions
job: Create a voice profiles config file defining the three V1 voice profiles (mike, phoebe, iaml-neutral) per PRD section 15. Each profile must include: tone, brevity, warmth, formality, assertiveness, sentenceStyle, preferredPhrases, avoidedPhrases, openingStyle, closingStyle, calendarPosture, boundaryPosture. Export a getVoiceProfile(voice) function and a recommendVoice(context) function that applies V1 default policy (strategicâ†’mike, operationalâ†’phoebe, generalâ†’iaml-neutral).
